data.name: PARADISE SHOOTING 2!!
data.detailed_description:
This is a casual shooting game in which players move your ship and destroy all the targets on the screen with special bullets to clear the game.
Use "conventional ammunition" to destroy the hordes of enemies that appear to protect your "target."
The game can be played to your advantage by obtaining "power-up items" that appear when you defeat enemies!



*"conventional ammunition" is fired automatically.
*To fire a "special bullet", hold down the SPACE key or click the left mouse button. Then release the button to fire!
*There are 5 stages in total. You will get a "Reward CG" for each stage you clear!


[Operation Explanation]
Movement of the ship : "WASD" or "arrow key"
special bullet : Press and hold the "SPACE" key or left mouse button and release
Game Interruption : Press "BackSpace" key or the "II" button on the right side of the screen

data.short_description: A simple shooting game in which players move your ship to destroy all the "targets" placed on the stage! Let's destroy the enemy hordes and get through all five stages!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 1+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 3000
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Direct Sound
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 2048 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 3000
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Direct Sound
